node.text: Maria's pup is learning commands and house training well.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "Coco pet adoption") on Session 31 (Score: 0.83)

node.text: Maria did not have any pets growing up, but having a furry companion brightens her days.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "Coco pet adoption") on Session 31 (Score: 0.83)

node.text: Maria got a puppy named Coco two weeks ago, bringing joy to her life.
Maria believes that taking care of her puppy, Coco, is worth the adjustment.
Maria finds joy in greeting her puppy, Coco, when coming home.
Maria started volunteering at a local dog shelter once a month, showing her compassion towards animals and her willingness to help.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "Coco pet adoption") on Session 17 (Score: 0.83)

node.text: Maria believes that animals bring comfort, understanding, and happiness to our lives.

node.text: Maria mentions that camping with pets can be soul-nourishing.
Maria shared a poster for a chili cook-off at the fundraiser with John.
Maria offered John her condolences and support after hearing about the loss of Max, acknowledging the importance of pets as part of the family.
